## What does this add?

<!-- One sentence: what asset(s) does this PR contribute? -->

## Type

- [ ] New skill (`skills/<name>/SKILL.md`)
- [ ] New command (`commands/<name>.md`)
- [ ] New rule (`rules/<topic>.md`)
- [ ] Fix or improvement to an existing asset
- [ ] Repository / documentation change

## Checklist

- [ ] Asset has one clear purpose and the name reflects it
- [ ] Frontmatter is complete — `name`, `description`, `allowed-tools`, `author` (skills); author HTML comment (commands)
- [ ] Every failure path prints what failed, why, and how to recover
- [ ] No hardcoded paths, usernames, or project-specific assumptions
- [ ] Tested manually against a real repository
- [ ] Filenames are lowercase kebab-case
